text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the morning after the Pretty Grand Prix preliminaries. Just as I'm
trying to work through a pile of paperwork...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Trainer, terrible news! Curren Chan is nowhere to be found...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan has... disappeared?! The rumor spreads through the
academy like wildfire.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, she left me a letter in her room. I take the letter from
Tazuna and gently open it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: "I'm going on a journey to seek enlightenment. There's gotta be a wise old Uma-sage out there somewhere."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Big Bro, sorry for deciding this all on my own. It's something I have to
do, for my dream..."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Big Sis, sorry for deciding this all on my own. It's something I have to
do, for my dream..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The letter abruptly ends there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like the sage thing must be a reference I'm not catching, but
maybe there's better clues on her Umastagram.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, the top post is a selfie of her smiling sadly at a port to
an island, uploaded a few seconds ago. The caption reads...

text_block_list.name: @Curren
text_block_list.text:
"#AWindblownFlower #SweptMindlesslyByTheTide
#CrestsTheWaterfall"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hashtags make a haiku... I wouldn't have pegged Curren Chan as
the poetry type, but I guess the flower imagery is a metaphor for her
current state of mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: More importantly—I have to go after her! Just in case, I'll bring that with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at the island, but I can't see any signs that people actually live
here. Did Curren Chan really come this far out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I explore deeper into the mountains, I hear the sound of a large
waterfall nearby. And alongside the roar of rushing water...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: This is... very... painful... but for my training... I must... endure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is muttering a sutra-like incantation underneath a roaring
waterfall?! I hastily run to her rescue and bring her out of the
mountains!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you found me... I can always count on you to find me when I'm
lost, Big Bro.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you found me... I can always count on you to find me when I'm
lost, Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know that she left that hint on her Umasta specifically so I could
follow her steps and find her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Mhm... Sure thing. What do you want to talk about?
choice_data_list: I want to get to know you better.
I want to get to know you better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, she hasn't talked about herself with me at all. Hearing
my reply, Curren Chan gently smiles.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, Big Bro... you want to know more than just the "cute" me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, Big Sis... you want to know more than just the "cute" me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, tell me this. Are you prepared... to know everything about me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nearly flinch at the intensity of her gaze, but... if I can't look her eye
to eye now, then I don't deserve to be her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You asked for it. Well then, why don't I start from when I was
born?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know how babies instinctively laugh a lot? Well, when I was a
baby, I was always laughing too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And when I laughed, my family would laugh along with me. They
called me cute, and it seemed to bring them so much happiness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Your cuteness has the power to make everyone happy." That's what
my Big Bro—my actual brother, I mean—said to me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Back then, I made up my mind to always be as cute as I can. That
was... when I was about three, I think?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I spent a lot of time researching how to be cute. One
day, one of my followers came up to me and said...

text_block_list.name: Curren Follower
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me! You're the Umastagrammer, Curren, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Follower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I was able to muster up the courage to change myself.
Curren, you're my hero.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Her words made me so happy. They made me realize that my
cuteness could bring joy to not only my own family, but so many
others too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I was happy when people called me cute, and everyone was happy
when I was cute.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanted to spread this circle of happiness as far as I could!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined that her concept of "cuteness" had so much deeper
meaning behind it.
choice_data_list:
Then why did you enroll here at Tracen
Academy?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well... Whenever I saw Umamusume racing on TV, they always shined
so brilliantly.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
They were dripping sweat, their hair was windswept, and a lot of the
time, they weren't even smiling. Some of them even looked kinda
scary...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
They couldn't have been further from the cuteness I'd known, refined,
and believed in. But when I watched them run...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Cute" was the first word that came to mind. Like, they were
practically sparkling!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I thought that if I enrolled at Tracen Academy and won races too, then I could sparkle like them... No, scratch that! I could sparkle even brighter than them!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to spread my name around to even more people! And one
day, the whole world would fall in love with me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...But at the Grand Prix preliminaries race, I couldn't live up to
everyone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You see, cuteness has to be absolutely perfect. If I destroy people's
dreams... That's not cute at all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Having my cleat fall off because I didn't prep properly? That's the most uncute thing ever!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's why I came here to train! I won't let myself make the same mistake again—I will change!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think I finally understand. Curren is a perfectionist who'll never stop
trying to improve herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her cuteness isn't just a whim or fancy. She works every second of
every day to make sure it radiates from every fiber of her body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Take her racing, for instance. Her sprinting isn't something easily
emulated—she must've put in countless hours of training to even get
to this point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And she did it all... to be cute.
choice_data_list: You really hate losing, don't you?
You really hate losing, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you calling me cute? It doesn't feel like it, though.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I hate losing, huh? Maybe... you're right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the first time, I feel like I understand Curren Chan as an
Umamusume. And I've got to say, I respect her way of life and how
she dedicates herself to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which means... I have a job to do as her trainer. It's up to me to make
her dreams come true!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll keep on training, until she can feel confident in her cuteness on
the track again. And to that end, I take out her fallen cleat and hold
it out to her.
choice_data_list: I've been looking for you, Princess.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Thanks, Big Bro.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Thanks, Big Sis.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, Curren and I have become true trainer and trainee. And
somehow, I'm sure that the legendary Uma-sage is watching over us
right now with a smile.
